🚨 Prithvi Shaw cheating scandal?🚨

Speculation is flying after Akriti Agarwal deleted every single trace of her March 2026 engagement with cricketer Prithvi Shaw.

- She reportedly confirmed the online chatter, stating, "all the rumours about him on social media are true." 

- The couple has mutually unfollowed each other on Instagram, though Shaw is yet to scrub the engagement photos from his official page. 👀

2073718773433991428.full_text:
India have the left-handers heavy batting line up. Tilak Varma struggles against spin, and we often see weaknesses in the middle order. So why doesn’t the India management think about batters like Rajat Patidar, who is a beast against spin and does well in the middle order?

It is very surprising that there is no talk about Rajat Patidar in the middle order. He is a right-hander and would make the case much stronger.
